claimText: The Goods and Services Tax Appellate Tribunal (GSTAT) is scheduled to become operational for appeals by September 2025.
evidenceExcerpt: The Goods and Services Tax Appellate Tribunal (GSTAT) will be operational by September 2025.
examUse: Statement-based question on GST dispute resolution mechanisms and timelines.
distractorHooks: National Company Law Appellate Tribunal (NCLAT) handling GST appeals

claimText: A simplified and optional GST registration scheme is recommended for small and low-risk businesses, set to be operational from November 2025.
evidenceExcerpt: A simplified optional GST registration scheme for small businesses will be operational from November 2025.
examUse: Statement-based question on ease of doing business and GST compliance for MSMEs.
distractorHooks: Applicable to all businesses regardless of size

claimText: Under GST export reforms, the place of supply for 'intermediary services' is determined by the location of the recipient, which aids Indian exporters.
evidenceExcerpt: The place of supply for intermediary services is now determined by the location of the recipient, aiding Indian exporters.
examUse: Concept-based question on GST place of supply rules and their impact on exports.
distractorHooks: Determined by the location of the service provider
Determined by the location of the intermediary
